hero.headline: Your routes. Your adventure. The global marketplace with live navigation.
hero.subheadline: Marketplace of ready GPX routes and PDF guides from local experts. Cycling, hiking, motorcycle, running and more.

navigation.text: Your browser is your guide. Tap and ride.

ready.title: Ready-made routes
ready.desc: GPX file + PDF guide to download after purchase

local.title: From local experts
local.desc: Routes built by people who actually rode them

creator.title: Become a creator
creator.desc: Share your passion and knowledge, build your portfolio, live from what you love

index.select_subcategory: Select a category to see sub-categories
index.no_routes_hint: Try adjusting your filters or search query

auth.signup_desc: Sign up to buy and create routes
auth.confirm_email: Please confirm your email address before logging in. Check your inbox.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.signup_success: Account created! Check your email to confirm your address.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.email_confirm_sent: Confirmation link sent to your new email
profile.login_to_view: Log in to view your profile

creator.become_desc: Share your routes with the community and earn 65% from every sale.
creator.login_to_manage: Log in to manage your routes
creator.connect_payments_desc: To receive payouts from route sales, you need to connect a Stripe Connect account.
creator.onboarding_incomplete_desc: Complete your Stripe account setup to receive payouts.
creator.stripe_benefit_1: Secure payouts directly to your account
creator.stripe_benefit_2: 65% of every sale goes to you
creator.stripe_benefit_4: Powered by Stripe — the leader in online payments
creator.what_you_get: What do you get as a creator?
creator.display_name_placeholder: What do you want to be called as a creator?
creator.about_placeholder: Short description — what inspires you, what routes you create...
creator.account_activated: Your creator account has been activated. Now connect Stripe Connect to receive payouts.

stripe.title: Stripe Connect
stripe.active_desc: Payouts and payments are enabled. You earn 65% of every sale.
stripe.finish_desc: Complete Stripe account setup to receive payouts.
stripe.no_account_desc: Connect a Stripe account to sell routes and receive payouts.

purchases.title: My Routes
purchases.login_to_view: Log in to view your purchased routes
purchases.no_purchases_hint: Explore our marketplace to find curated routes with GPX tracks and PDF guides.
purchases.gpx_no_file: This route has no GPX file to download
purchases.weather_reminder: Verify weather and current route conditions before departure.
purchases.weather_reminder_sub: Trail conditions can change rapidly. Always check local forecasts and alerts.
purchases.support_description: Issues downloading files or accessing routes? We're here to help.
purchases.safety_refunds_desc: Review safety info before each trip. Damaged or incorrect files may qualify for a refund.

favorites.title: Favorite Routes
favorites.no_favorites_hint: Click the heart icon on a route card to add it to favorites

route_detail.gpx_desc: Import directly into Garmin, Wahoo, Komoot, or any GPS device
route_detail.pdf_desc: Detailed guide with tips, photos, waypoints, and local knowledge
route_detail.preview_only: Preview only — full route unlocks after purchase
route_detail.ai_assisted_desc: Some content was generated or supported by AI tools.
route_detail.refund_summary: Refunds for damaged or files not matching description.

payment.no_session: Missing payment ID. Go to "My Routes" to download your files.
payment.confirming: Confirming payment and preparing files for download…

buyer_consent.title: Pre-purchase confirmation
buyer_consent.description: Please review and accept the following declarations before purchasing this route.
buyer_consent.risk: I understand that outdoor activities carry inherent risk — including injury, illness, or danger to life.
buyer_consent.conditions: I understand that route conditions may differ from the guide description due to weather, seasons, or terrain changes.
buyer_consent.weather: I will check the current weather forecast and local alerts before starting the activity.
buyer_consent.skills: I have the proper skills, physical fitness, and equipment for this activity.

creator_declarations.title: Creator declarations
creator_declarations.description: Accept all declarations to publish this route.
creator_declarations.copyright: I am the author of this content or hold full rights to publish and sell it.
creator_declarations.no_infringement: The files and content do not infringe copyrights, trademarks, or third-party rights.
creator_declarations.accuracy: The route description, parameters, and waypoints are accurate to the best of my knowledge as of the publication date.
creator_declarations.terrain_changes: Terrain conditions may change — the route can become more difficult or dangerous.
creator_declarations.terms_accept: I accept the creator's liability as defined in the platform's Terms of Service.

create_route.ai_question: Did you use artificial intelligence tools when creating this route?
create_route.ai_scope_label: AI usage scope (select all that apply)
create_route.ai_note_placeholder: e.g. Description generated by GPT and manually verified
create_route.gpx_upload_hint: Distance and route will be read automatically
create_route.creator_required: You need creator role to publish routes

home.title: RouteMarket — buy and sell GPX routes for cycling, motorcycling and hiking
home.description: Marketplace for GPX routes: cycling, motorcycling, hiking and driving. Download GPX files, PDF guides and interactive maps with POIs from trusted creators.

map.title: GPX Route Map — explore routes near you
map.description: Interactive GPX route map. Filter by category and discover cycling, motorcycling, hiking and driving routes across Europe.

contact.title: Contact — RouteMarket
contact.description: Get in touch with the RouteMarket team. Technical support, creator and buyer enquiries.

favorites.title: Favorite Routes
favorites.description: Your list of favorite GPX routes saved for later.

ai.label: AI
ai.title: AI Title
ai.rate_limit: Too many AI requests — try again later

step1.title: GPX file and basic information
step1.subtitle: Upload a GPX file — data will be filled in automatically
step1.gpx_drop: Drag a GPX file or click to choose
step1.gpx_too_large: GPX file must be smaller than 20MB

step2.title: Route parameters
step2.gpx_filled_note: Values filled automatically from GPX. You can edit them.

step3.title: Description and photos
step3.subtitle: Add a detailed description and photos (min. 1, max. 6)
step3.description_placeholder: Describe the route, terrain, attractions along the way, what to see...
step3.photos_hint: First photo will be the cover. Drag to reorder.
step3.social_subtitle: Optional — add Instagram or YouTube links so buyers can see route content.

step4.title: Points of interest (POI)
step4.subtitle: Click on the map to add a point or use the button below
step4.name: Name

step5.title: Tips & recommendations
step5.subtitle: Add useful information for travelers
step5.before_network_ph: Where there is signal, where it may not be...
step5.before_weather_ph: What to expect in different seasons...
step5.rec_description_ph: What's good to know about this place

step6.title: Safety & declarations
step6.subtitle: Information about route risk and requirements

data_confidence_options.medium: Medium — ridden, but a while ago

step6.hazards_ph:
One hazard per line, e.g.
Steep path near edge
No lighting in tunnel
step6.equipment_ph:
One item per line, e.g.
Helmet
Flashlight
Water 2L
step6.ai_used: AI was used to create this route

step7.title: Preview & publish
step7.subtitle: Review your data and publish the route
step7.pdf_notice_title: PDF guide will be generated automatically
step7.pdf_notice_body: After publishing, the system will automatically create a professional PDF guide based on your data.
step7.pdf_save_first: Save draft before generating PDF preview
step7.translations_body: Choose languages the route should be translated into after publishing.
